summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sadafal Tech landing page. All key requirements verified: VSL video moved into hero section, all CTA buttons link to Calendly with target='_blank', booking form replaced with Calendly CTA card. Backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API GET /api/ returns correct message
Backend API POST /api/bookings creates bookings successfully
Backend API GET /api/bookings retrieves bookings successfully
Navigation logo and links display correctly
Navigation CTA links to https://sadafaltech.com/book-a-call with target='_blank'
Hero section headline and subheadline visible
VSL video placeholder with play button moved INTO hero section above CTA
Hero CTA button links to https://sadafaltech.com/book-a-call with target='_blank'
Hero stats row (27L+, 83%, 90) displays correctly
VSL section 'Ready to Stop Losing Bookings?' CTA box with correct Calendly link
Pain points section shows 4+ cards
Proof section displays 3 stats (27%, 25%, 20%)
How It Works section with 4 steps found
Deliverables section with 6 cards found
Booking section shows checklist on left and Calendly CTA card on right
FAQ section with 6 accordion items - expand/collapse functionality working
Final CTA section links to https://sadafaltech.com/book-a-call with target='_blank'
Footer section present
Mobile responsive design - hamburger menu works correctly
All CTA buttons correctly link to external Calendly URL
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (3/3 APIs working), Frontend: 100% (all features working as expected)
